title: Why Is Wolfspeed Stock Skyrocketing Wednesday?
text: Wolfspeed Inc. (NYSE: WOLF) experienced a significant 24.65% surge on Wednesday, driven by analyst recognition of the company's potential in AI infrastructure markets. Research firm Citrini identified the semiconductor manufacturer as its single-stock highlight in the AI infrastructure space, highlighting anticipated benefits from increased demand for power and semiconductor infrastructure supporting artificial intelligence systems. The stock momentum reflects investor enthusiasm despite recent disappointing earnings. In its fiscal third quarter, Wolfspeed reported adjusted losses exceeding analyst expectations and revenue that fell below consensus estimates. The company projects modest revenue of $140-$160 million for the fourth quarter, with negative gross margins persisting. Technically, the stock displays overbought conditions with an RSI of 83.24, trading 82% above its 20-day moving average. Over the past year, shares have appreciated 1,475%, significantly outpacing broader market indices. Analysts maintain a Buy rating with a $20 average price target, suggesting potential downside from current levels. Wolfspeed manufactures silicon carbide semiconductors for power electronics, positioning itself as a key beneficiary in electric vehicle and renewable energy markets.
